reviews.author: Mike D.
reviews.text: Best ice in Boston. Two NHL sheets and a pro staff. Hard to beat.

reviews.author: Sarah K.
reviews.text: Can get crowded on weekends but ice quality is top notch.

reviews.author: Jessica L.
reviews.text: World-class facility. Home to national champions.

reviews.author: Maria G.
reviews.text: Affordable public rink in the city. Gets busy on weekends.

reviews.author: Lars H.
reviews.text: Right next to Xcel Energy Center. Amazing facility and friendly staff.

reviews.author: Pittsy
reviews.text: Where the Pens train. First class everything — incredible ice.

reviews.author: Emma S.
reviews.text: Iconic NYC experience. Manhattan skyline backdrop is unbeatable.

reviews.author: Kevin P.
reviews.text: Beautiful but gets very crowded. Go early.

reviews.author: Alex T.
reviews.text: Two full ice sheets in Manhattan. Hidden gem for hockey players.

reviews.author: Cap Hawk
reviews.text: Train where the Caps train. Two sheets, pro quality everything.

reviews.author: Philly Fan
reviews.text: Two sheets, great leagues. Staff is super helpful.

reviews.author: Smashville
reviews.text: Home of the Predators development. Amazing facility and great staff.

reviews.author: Knight Fan
reviews.text: State of the art. Best NHL practice facility in the league.

reviews.author: Denver Dave
reviews.text: Three ice sheets! Great for families and adult leagues.

reviews.author: Red Fan
reviews.text: Had a chance to skate here for a charity event. Incredible facility.

reviews.author: CBJ Fan
reviews.text: Got to skate here for charity. Absolutely incredible facility.

name: Fond du Lac Blue Line Family Ice Center
